clusters.justification: Captures the broad processing of emotional valence, arousal, and mood state regulation inherently mapped to limbic and anterior insular co-activations.
Represents the macro-level calculation of subjective utility, reward processing, and goal-directed behavioral drive linked to striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry.
Encompasses internally directed, self-generated thought processes spanning personal memory, self-representation, and social conceptualization characteristically supported by the default mode network.
